title: eruca sativa var. vesicaria
intro: Eruca sativa var. vesicaria, also known as rocket or wild arugula, is a wild or weedy plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and is a variant of the more commonly known Eruca sativa. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Eruca sativa var. vesicaria include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
